metadata.title: Truckers Choice - Truck Insurance & Permits Specialists
metadata.description: Truck insurance, permits and compliance paperwork in Medley FL, Jersey City NJ and Elizabeth NJ.

home.title: Truckers Choice Insurance & Permits
home.subtitle: The premium bilingual one-stop solution for truck insurance, authority, registration, and compliance.

hero.title: Insurance + Permits. One roof.
hero.subcopy: Simplifying commercial trucking operations and protecting your fleet.
hero.trust_text: 30 confirmed services in one connected catalog

oneroof.title: Everything under one roof.
oneroof.description: Truckers Choice coordinates truck insurance, DOT authority, registration plates, permits and compliance paperwork in one connected workflow.
oneroof.bullet_1: Commercial Truck Insurance tailored to your cargo
oneroof.bullet_2: DOT & MC Authority registration (USDOT, BOC-3, UCR)
oneroof.bullet_3: IRP Plates, Apportioned Registrations & Fuel Tax (IFTA)
oneroof.bullet_4: DOT audit assistance and confirmed driver-testing services

journey.title: How It Works
journey.step_1_desc: Set up your LLC/Corp and obtain your EIN/Tax ID.
journey.step_2_desc: Register USDOT/MC, file BOC-3, and activate UCR.
journey.step_3_desc: Bind custom insurance and register IRP plates & IFTA.
journey.step_4_desc: Organize confirmed driver paperwork, testing services and DOT audit assistance.

locations.title: Our Offices
locations.subtitle: Bilingual support and comprehensive commercial trucking services at our physical branches across Florida and New Jersey.

about.title: About Us
about.hero_title: One team for connected trucking paperwork
about.hero_desc: Helping commercial truckers, owner-operators, and fleets navigate authority, permits, and insurance under one roof.
about.timeline_1_desc: Start with the business, vehicles, routes and current paperwork.
about.timeline_2_desc: Connect confirmed authority, registration, permit, insurance or compliance needs.
about.timeline_3_desc: Prepare documents and next steps around one coordinated plan.
about.timeline_4_desc: Keep renewals, permits and compliance paperwork organized.
about.value_1_desc: Bilingual support helps make complex trucking decisions clearer in English or Spanish.
about.value_2_desc: We handle truck insurance, permits, and federal DOT compliance in one single, coordinated workflow.
about.value_3_desc: We separate confirmed services from unapproved claims so the guidance stays clear and responsible.
about.trust_desc: We coordinate insurance, permits, registrations, and compliance through one trucking-focused team.
about.cta_title: Ready to get on the road?
about.cta_desc: Get in touch with one of our compliance specialists today and start your trucking business right.

roadStory.ch1_title: The storm doesn't ask if you're covered.
roadStory.ch1_body: A breakdown at mile 212, rain coming down, and the load still has a deadline. With the right insurance this is a phone call, not a crisis.
roadStory.ch1_alt: Semi-truck stopped on the shoulder at night in the rain, warning triangle on the wet asphalt
roadStory.ch2_title: The paperwork rides with you. Until someone takes it.
roadStory.ch2_body: Permits, fuel tax, renewals — every form rides shotgun and none of them moves the truck. Hand them to a desk that lives for this.
roadStory.ch2_alt: Driver in his cab at night, surrounded by paperwork
roadStory.ch3_title: Behind every mile, an office that answers.
roadStory.ch3_body: Three offices, two languages, one team that picks up the phone — Medley, Jersey City and Elizabeth, working while you drive.
roadStory.ch3_alt: Aerial view of a highway interchange glowing at night beneath the clouds
roadStory.ch4_body: Paper in order, truck insured, authority active. All that's left is the part you actually signed up for: driving.
roadStory.ch4_alt: Semi-truck driving toward a golden sunrise on an open highway
